backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining Product, CartItem, and Order types with CRUD operations for a clothing store, including store initialization with sample products across four categories.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module defining OldActor and NewActor state shapes (identical) and a no-op `run` function for schema migration support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking two implemented features—admin image upload fix and product image display with fallback—to their affected files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON summaries describing the purpose and recent changes of each frontend source file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS color tokens for light and dark themes used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with the page title set to 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with all application routes (home, catalog, product, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin) under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with logo, collections/studio nav links, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with centered logo, desktop category navigation, Admin link, cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shell layout component that wraps page content with Header and Footer using TanStack Router's Outlet.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image, name, price, and sizes, including a hover-triggered quick-add-to-cart button that calls the addToCart mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for products, cart, and orders, including queries and mutations that call the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind layers, and defines the warm neutral color palette (CSS variables) for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions and constants including class merging (cn), INR price formatting, and category label/slug/image mappings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin page for managing products with a table view and dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting products, including client-side image compression before upload.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Renders the shopping cart page with a CartItemRow component that supports quantity increment/decrement and item removal, displaying line totals and a checkout summary.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Displays a product catalog page filtered by category, with category tab navigation, loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a product grid.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Provides a checkout form for delivery details (name and address), displays an order summary with cart items and subtotal, and places the order on submission.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero banner, brand statement, and a category card grid; auto-initializes the store if no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows a post-order confirmation screen with a success icon, order reference ID from URL search params, and links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a single product's detail page with image, size selector, add-to-cart functionality, and loading/error states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the theme with custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording existing features (fixing base64 image upload in admin product form, updating product display components to render stored images) and a pending backend task (AR-1) to add an `image` field to the product type and update CRUD functions.
